tuning_key.text: Release attachments to outcomes we've drawn / The schemas we're tied to turn us into pawns
tuning_key.attribution: Chords of Truth — Lucid Principles Canon (CC BY 4.0)

context_block: The grip you have been holding—on the shape of tomorrow, on how this was supposed to look—is ready to open. There is a space between the plan and the reality that is breathing you now, carrying you toward a configuration you could not draw but can finally inhabit. Let the exhale complete itself; what manifests in the loosening is not loss, but the real current you were never meant to steer alone.

practice.title: Locate the Grip
practice.instruction: Feel where your body is holding tension—jaw, shoulders, or belly—and silently name the specific outcome you are trying to squeeze into existence.

practice.title: Open the Fist
practice.instruction: On your next exhale, let that tension soften like fingers uncurling into warm air, creating space where the plan used to tighten.

practice.title: Enter the Current
practice.instruction: Listen to today's Echo audio and let the sound carry you into the trust that unfolds when you stop drawing lines around what must be.
